titles.title: I Just Want To Thank You, Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: And I just want to thank You, Lord, For letting me hear Your Word; What have I done to deserve Such glory that's revealed in me? Thanks for that special night, When I saw Your glorious Light Came face to face with Eternal Life. Lord, I thank You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You didn't have to open my eyes, You could have easily passed me by, For the age I was living in was wretched, poor and blind; Then I heard "Recognizing Your Day" "Serpent Seed" and "Perfect Faith," "The Breach" and "The Message of Grace," Lord, I thank You.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Not even in my wildest dreams did I see I'd see such things As "The Coming of the Lord," "The Rapture Mystery," "I Have Heard But Now I See," "God In Simplicity," "The Spoken Word Is The Original Seed," Lord, I thank You.
